            if (currentIsMobile) {
                dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Mobile. Número de páginas (itens): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            } else {
                dataForSlider = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < initialItemsHTML.length; i += 3) {
                    dataForSlider.push(initialItemsHTML.slice(i, i + 3)); 
                }
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Desktop. Número de páginas (grupos de 3): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            }
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length > 0 ) { 
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: actualPagesCount é 0 após processar os itens. Verifique a lógica de agrupamento ou o número de itens HTML. O slider ficará vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            } else if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                 console.log("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum item para processar, slider permanecerá vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return;
            }


            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderPageWidth === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: getSliderWidth() retornou 0. sliderContentEl pode não estar visível/renderizado com largura. As páginas do Slider terão largura 0.");
            }

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    console.warn(`AboutPageSlider: Tentando renderizar uma página vazia ou indefinida no índice do track ${index}. Isso pode ocorrer se 'dataForSlider' estiver malformado para os clones.`);
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            previousIsMobile = currentIsMobile; 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-initialized');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Configuração do slider concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}, Track Index inicial: ${currentTrackIndex}`);
            
            // Atribuição de event listeners DEPOIS que os elementos são confirmados
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            // Listeners de mousemove e mouseup/touchend no document para melhor experiência
            // Estes podem ser anexados mesmo se sliderContentEl não for encontrado, pois não dependem dele diretamente
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) {
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount - 1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = segmentIndex; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado para anexar listeners de clique.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); // Re-setup completo se o tipo de visualização mudar
                } else {
                    // Apenas ajusta larguras se o tipo de visualização não mudou
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        // Usar addEventListener para 'load' é geralmente mais seguro do que atribuir window.onload diretamente
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); // Fim da IIFE
    </script>


<script>
        // IIFE to encapsulate
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {
                    console.error("Quote slider: Number of slides and pagination dots do not match or elements not found.");
                    return;
                }

                function showSlide(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;

                    slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active-quote');
                    dots[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');

                    slides[index].classList.add('active-quote');
                    dots[index].classList.add('active');

                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                }

                dots.forEach(dot => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const targetIndex = parseInt(dot.getAttribute('data-slide-target'), 10);
                        showSlide(targetIndex);
                    });
                });

                showSlide(0);

            });
        })();
    </script>

<script>
        // IIFE para encapsular
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.expandable-list .list-item');
                const imageDisplay = document.getElementById('image-display');
                let activeItem = null;

                if (listItems.length === 0 || !imageDisplay) {
                    console.error("Elementos da lista ou display de imagem não encontrados.");
                    return;
                }

                // Função para calcular e definir a posição/altura do indicador
                function positionIndicator(item) {
                    const indicator = item.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                    const contentWrapper = item.querySelector('.item-content-wrapper');
                    const header = item.querySelector('.item-header');
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');

                    if (!indicator || !contentWrapper || !header || !description) return;

                    // Posição do topo do header RELATIVA AO list-item
                    const headerTopRelativeToListItem = contentWrapper.offsetTop + header.offsetTop;

                    // Calcula a altura do conteúdo visível
                    let contentHeight = header.offsetHeight;
                    if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                        const descMarginTop = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(description).marginTop) || 0;
                        // Usa scrollHeight para altura real da descrição
                        contentHeight += descMarginTop + description.scrollHeight;
                    } else {
                         // Se inativo, a altura deve ser zero para o cálculo do indicador
                         contentHeight = 0; // Garante que indicador inativo tenha altura 0 no cálculo
                    }

                    // Aplica os estilos ao indicador
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        indicator.style.top = `${headerTopRelativeToListItem}px`;
                        // Define altura zero se não estiver ativo, caso contrário usa a calculada
                        indicator.style.height = item.classList.contains('active') ? `${Math.max(0, contentHeight)}px` : '0px';
                    });
                }

                // Função para trocar imagem com fade
                function changeImageWithFade(imageUrl) {
                     if (!imageDisplay) return;
                     imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', `url('${imageUrl}')`);
                     imageDisplay.classList.add('fade-in');
                     setTimeout(() => {
                         imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
                         imageDisplay.classList.remove('fade-in');
                         imageDisplay.style.removeProperty('--bg-image-before');
                     }, 800);
                 }
                 imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', 'none');


                function setActiveItem(clickedItem) {
                    if (clickedItem === activeItem) return;

                    // Desativa o item anterior
                    if (activeItem) {
                        const oldDesc = activeItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                        activeItem.classList.remove('active'); // Remove classe do LI
                        if (oldDesc) {
                            oldDesc.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                            oldDesc.style.marginTop = '0px';
                        }
                         // Reseta explicitamente a altura do indicador antigo
                         const oldIndicator = activeItem.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                         if (oldIndicator) oldIndicator.style.height = '0px';
                    }

                    // Ativa o novo item
                    const newDesc = clickedItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                    clickedItem.classList.add('active'); // Adiciona classe ao LI
                    if (newDesc) {
                        newDesc.style.marginTop = '0.5rem';
                        // Define max-height para animar abertura
                         requestAnimationFrame(() => { // Garante cálculo após DOM update
                             newDesc.style.maxHeight = newDesc.scrollHeight + "px";
                             // Posiciona o indicador APÓS definir maxHeight
                             positionIndicator(clickedItem); // Chama para definir altura e top
                         });
                    } else {
                        // Se não houver descrição, posiciona baseado só no header
                        positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                    }

                    activeItem = clickedItem; // Atualiza referência

                    // Atualiza imagem
                    const imageSrc = clickedItem.getAttribute('data-image');
                    if (imageSrc) {
                        changeImageWithFade(imageSrc);
                    }
                }

                // Adiciona listeners de clique
                listItems.forEach(item => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', () => { // Listener no LI
                        setActiveItem(item);
                    });

                    // Listener para ajustar indicador após transição da descrição
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');
                     if (description) {
                         description.addEventListener('transitionend', (event) => {
                             if (event.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                                 // Recalcula altura/posição do indicador após animação
                                 positionIndicator(item);
                             }
                         });
                     }
                });

                // Ativa o primeiro item inicialmente
                if (listItems.length > 0) {
                    const firstItem = listItems[0];
                    const initialImageSrc = firstItem.getAttribute('data-image');

                    if (initialImageSrc && imageDisplay) {
                        imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${initialImageSrc}')`;
                    }
                    // Usa a função setActiveItem para inicializar corretamente
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        setActiveItem(firstItem);
                    }, 50);
                }

                 // Reposiciona indicador no resize
                 window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                     if (activeItem) {
                         setTimeout(() => positionIndicator(activeItem), 100);
                     }
                 });

            });
        })();
    </script>


<script>
// IIFE para encapsular
(function() {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
        const paginationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-item');
        const paginationBarContainer = document.querySelector('.pagination-bar-container');

        let paginationIndicator = document.querySelector('.pagination-indicator');
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            console.log("Slider principal: Criando o elemento '.pagination-indicator' dinamicamente.");
            paginationIndicator = document.createElement('div');
            paginationIndicator.classList.add('pagination-indicator');
            paginationBarContainer.appendChild(paginationIndicator);
        }

        if (slides.length === 0 || paginationItems.length === 0 || slides.length !== paginationItems.length) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Número de slides e itens de paginação não correspondem ou elementos não encontrados. Verifique as classes '.slide' e '.pagination-item'.");
            return;
        }
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) { // Verificação ajustada: só erro se o container existe mas o indicador não pôde ser criado/achado
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-indicator' não pôde ser encontrado ou criado.");
            // Não retorna aqui, pois o indicador pode ser opcional para a funcionalidade básica se o CSS o esconder
        }
        if (!paginationBarContainer) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-bar-container' não encontrado. O indicador não pode ser posicionado e o scrollIntoView não funcionará como esperado.");
            // Considerar retornar se paginationBarContainer é essencial para outras funcionalidades além do indicador
        }

        // Função para atualizar o slide ativo, item de paginação ativo e indicador
        // Adicionamos o parâmetro 'isInitialLoad' com valor padrão 'false'
        function goToSlide(index, isInitialLoad = false) {
            if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) {
                console.error("Índice do slide fora dos limites:", index);
                return;
            }

            const currentActiveSlide = document.querySelector('.slide.active-slide');
            const currentActivePaginationItem = document.querySelector('.pagination-item.active-pagination-item');
            if (currentActiveSlide) {
                currentActiveSlide.classList.remove('active-slide');
            }
            if (currentActivePaginationItem) {
                currentActivePaginationItem.classList.remove('active-pagination-item');
            }

            slides[index].classList.add('active-slide');
            paginationItems[index].classList.add('active-pagination-item');

            if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[index];
                const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                    const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                    if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                        paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                        paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                    }
                });

                // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI:
                // Só executa scrollIntoView se NÃO for a carga inicial
                if (!isInitialLoad) {
                    targetPaginationItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' });
                }
            }
        }

        paginationItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });

            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
            // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI: Passamos 'true' para isInitialLoad
            goToSlide(0, true);
        }, 100);


        let resizeTimeout;
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
            resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                if (currentActiveIndex !== -1 && paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                    const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                    const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                            const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                            const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                            paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }, 250);
        });

        if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            let scrollTimeout;
            paginationBarContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                    if (currentActiveIndex !== -1) {
                        const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                        const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }, 150);
            }, { passive: true });
        }
    });
})();
</script>


<script>
  // IIFE para encapsular o código e evitar conflitos globais
  (function() {
    // Espera o HTML carregar
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const divider = document.getElementById('scroll-divider');

      // Verifica se o elemento divisor existe
      if (!divider) {
        console.error("Elemento divisor (#scroll-divider) não encontrado. Verifique o ID no HTML.");
        return; // Interrompe se não encontrar
      }

      let startTime = null; // Para rastrear o tempo da animação
      const animationDuration = 3000; // Duração de um ciclo COMPLETO (ida e volta) em ms (ex: 3 segundos)
      const mainColor = '#7735fc';      // Cor principal/escura
      const highlightColor = '#ba97fc'; // Cor clara que vai se mover
      // *** AUMENTADO O TAMANHO DA FAIXA ***
      const bandWidthPercent = 90;      // Largura da faixa clara em porcentagem (ex: 70% - bem maior)

      // Função que será chamada repetidamente para animar
      const animateDivider = (timestamp) => {
        // Garante que o divisor ainda existe no DOM
        if (!document.body.contains(divider)) {
            console.log("Elemento divisor removido do DOM, parando a animação.");
            return;
        }

        if (!startTime) {
          startTime = timestamp; // Define o tempo inicial na primeira execução
        }

        const elapsedTime = timestamp - startTime;
        // Calcula o progresso dentro de um ciclo (0 a 1)
        const progressRaw = (elapsedTime % animationDuration) / animationDuration;

        // --- Lógica de Animação Modificada (Ping-Pong) ---

        // Usa cosseno para criar um movimento suave de ida e volta (0 -> 1 -> 0)
        // Math.cos(progressRaw * Math.PI * 2) vai de 1 a -1 e volta a 1.
        // (1 - cos) / 2 mapeia isso para o intervalo 0 a 1 e volta a 0.
        const angle = progressRaw * Math.PI * 2; // Ângulo para um ciclo completo (0 a 2*PI)
        const pingPongProgress = (1 - Math.cos(angle)) / 2; // Valor oscilante entre 0 e 1

        // Calcula a posição central da faixa clara (0% a 100%) com base no progresso oscilante
        const centerPercent = pingPongProgress * 100;

        // Calcula as posições de início e fim da transição para a cor clara
        // Garante que as posições fiquem dentro de 0 e 100
        const startHighlight = Math.max(0, centerPercent - bandWidthPercent / 2);
        const endHighlight = Math.min(100, centerPercent + bandWidthPercent / 2);

        // Define o gradiente para ir de cima para baixo ('to bottom')
        divider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to bottom,
          ${mainColor} 0%,
          ${mainColor} ${startHighlight}%,
          ${highlightColor} ${centerPercent}%,
          ${mainColor} ${endHighlight}%,
          ${mainColor} 100%
        )`;
        // --- Fim da Lógica Modificada ---

        // Solicita o próximo quadro da animação, criando o loop
        requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);
      };

      // Inicia o loop da animação
      requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);

    });
  })(); // Executa a IIFE
</script>



<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Seleciona o botão de fechar
    const closeButton = document.getElementById('close-business-bar');
    // Seleciona o wrapper da barra de negócios
    const businessBarWrapper = document.getElementById('business-bar-wrapper');
    // Seleciona o corpo do documento
    const bodyElement = document.body;

    // Verifica se ambos os elementos existem para evitar erros
    if (closeButton && businessBarWrapper && bodyElement) {
        closeButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Adiciona a classe 'hidden' ao wrapper da barra para escondê-la
            businessBarWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Adiciona a classe 'business-bar-hidden' ao body para ajustar o header
            bodyElement.classList.add('business-bar-hidden');
            
            // Opcional: Log para confirmar que o evento ocorreu (bom para debug)
            // console.log('Business bar fechada!');
        });
    } else {
        if (!closeButton) {
            console.error('Botão #close-business-bar não encontrado.');
        }
        if (!businessBarWrapper) {
            console.error('Elemento #business-bar-wrapper não encontrado.');
        }
    }
});
</script>

<!-- Custom Code --><style> 
  body.tweak-transparent-header .header:not(.shrink):not(.transparent-header-theme--override) { 
	margin-top: 100px !important; 
} 
// BUSINESS BAR // 
.business-bar-wrapper{ 
  background-color: #e5e3e0; 
  padding: 8px 3vw; 
  position: relative; 
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease, max-height 0.5s ease, padding 0.5s ease, margin 0.5s ease, border 0.5s ease; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  max-height: 100px; /* Altura inicial estimada */ 
  opacity: 1; 
  box-sizing: border-box; 
} 
 
.business-bar{ 
  align-items: center; 
  display: flex; 
  margin: 0 auto; 
  max-width: 1440px; 
  justify-content: space-between; 
} 
 
/*Close Button*/ 
 
    	#close-business-bar { 
        	cursor: pointer; 
        	padding: 5px; /* Aumenta a área de clique */ 
        	line-height: 0; /* Remove espaço extra da linha do botão */ 
        	background: none; 
        	border: none; 
        	display: flex; /* Ajuda a centralizar o SVG */ 
        	align-items: center; 
        	justify-content: center; 
    	} 
 
    	/* Estilos para o SVG do ícone 'X' */ 
    	#close-business-bar svg { 
        	width: 14px; /* Largura do ícone */ 
        	height: 14px; /* Altura do ícone */ 
        	stroke: #555; /* Cor das linhas do X */ 
        	stroke-width: 1; /* Espessura das linhas */ 
        	transition: stroke 0.2s ease; /* Suaviza a mudança de cor no hover */ 
    	} 
 
    	#close-business-bar:hover svg { 
        	stroke: #000; /* Cor das linhas ao passar o mouse */ 
    	} 
 
    	/* Classe para esconder a barra */ 
    	.business-bar-wrapper.hidden { 
        	opacity: 0; 
        	max-height: 0; 
        	padding-top: 0; 
        	padding-bottom: 0; 
        	margin-top: 0; 
        	margin-bottom: 0; 
        	border-width: 0; /* Garante que a borda também suma */ 
    	} 
 
    	body.business-bar-hidden #header { 
       	margin-top: 0px !important; 
    	} 




/* Add this to account for business bar when header is fixed */ .tweak-fixed-header:not(.sqs-edit-mode-active):not(.sqs-site-styles-active):not(.business-bar-hidden) .header { transition: background-color 0.5s ease-in-out; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); position: fixed; top: 100px !important; /* Height of business bar */ margin-top: 0px !important; } /* When business bar is hidden, header goes back to top */ body.business-bar-hidden .tweak-fixed-header:not(.sqs-edit-mode-active):not(.sqs-site-styles-active) .header { top: 0px !important; }








@media screen and (max-width: 960px){ 
  .business-bar--left p{ 
	font-size: 15px !important; 
  }  
  } 
   
   @media (max-width: 767px) { 
    
    	.business-bar{ 
	flex-direction: row !important; 
  } 
  .business-bar-left{ 
	width: 50% !important; 
  } 
  .business-bar-wrapper{ 
  background-color: #e5e3e0; 
  padding: 8px 5vw; 
} 
</style>

        <div id="animated-section">
        <div class="component-container">
            <div class="component-flex-wrapper">

                <div class="title-column">
                    <h1 class="component-title">
                        Impossible until it’s not</h1>
                </div>

                <div class="content-column">
                    <div id="scroll-divider" class="scroll-animated-divider" style="background: linear-gradient(rgb(119, 53, 252) 0%, rgb(119, 53, 252) 0%, rgb(186, 151, 252) 29.6632%, rgb(119, 53, 252) 74.6632%, rgb(119, 53, 252) 100%);">
                        </div>
                    <div class="text-column" style="padding-bottom:10px;">
                        <p>
                            Quantum computing will transform industries and provide a new level of mastery over the physical world.
                            </p>
                        <p>
                            But this transformation hinges on building the world’s first commercially useful quantum computers—fault tolerant and on the order of one million qubits. PsiQuantum’s thesis is that the unique strengths of photonic qubits, combined with direct leverage of high-volume semiconductor manufacturing, provide a fast, practical path to scale.
                             </p>
                        <p>
                            That vision of <b>delivering a commercially useful quantum computer has been our mission from day one</b>.

                            </p>
                    </div>
                </div>

    <style>
        /* --- START: MAIN SLIDER CSS --- */
        #main-slider-outter-wrapper {
            width: 100%; 
            max-width: 1440px; 
            border-radius: 5px; 
            overflow: hidden !important; 
            position: relative; 
            margin: auto;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }
        #main-slider-outter-container {
            width: 100%; 
            max-width: 1440px;
            position: relative;
            min-height: calc(60vh + 30px);
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: #000;
            border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;
            overflow: hidden; 
            /* Prevent text selection during swipe */
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
            -ms-user-select: none;
        }
        .main-slider-outter-slide {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 1.2s ease;
            z-index: 1;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            padding: 4rem 5rem; 
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
            box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2000px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
           
        }
        .main-slider-outter-slide.active-slide { 
            opacity: 1; 
            z-index: 2; 
        }
        .main-slider-outter-title {
            font-size: 56px; 
            font-weight: 500;
            margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;
            color: #fff;
            line-height: 1.1;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }
        .main-slider-outter-caption {
            font-size: 18px; 
            margin: 0 0 1.25rem 0;
            color: #fff;
            max-width: 394px; 
            line-height: 1.6;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
        }
        .main-slider-outter-link {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            color: #fff;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: bold;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 18px;
        }
        .main-slider-outter-link:hover { color: #ba97fc; }
        .main-slider-outter-link svg { 
            width: 1em; 
            height: 1em; 
            stroke: currentColor; 
            stroke-width: 1; 
        }
        #main-slider-outter-pagination-bar-container {
            width: 100%; 
            max-width: 1440px;
            display: flex;
            background-color: #1a1a1a;
            position: relative;
            min-height: 73px; 
            box-sizing: border-box;
            overflow-x: auto;
            border-radius: 0 0 5px 5px;
            scrollbar-width: none;
            -ms-overflow-style: none;
        }
        #main-slider-outter-pagination-bar-container::-webkit-scrollbar { 
            display: none;
        }
        
        .main-slider-outter-pagination-item {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            flex-grow: 1;
            flex-basis: 0;
            padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 22px !important;
            color: #fff;
            cursor: pointer;
            background: none;
            border: none;
            border-right: 1px solid #444444;
            text-align: center;
            position: relative;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 0.4em;
            transition: font-weight 0.2s ease;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        .main-slider-outter-pagination-item:last-of-type { 
            border-right: none; 
        }
        
        .main-slider-outter-pagination-item.active-pagination-item,
        .main-slider-outter-pagination-item:hover {
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .main-slider-outter-pagination-number {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #7e58f5;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.2;
            transition: color 0.3s ease;
            margin-bottom: 8px !important;
        }
        
        #main-slider-outter-pagination-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            height: 2px;
            width: 0;
            border-radius: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7735fc 20%, #ba97fc 50%, #7735fc 80%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: sweepDirect 1.5s linear infinite alternate;
            transition: left 0.5s ease-in-out, width 0.5s ease-in-out;
            z-index: 2;
        }
        @keyframes sweepDirect {
            0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
            100% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        }

        /* --- START: Mobile Arrow Navigation Styles --- */
        .main-slider-nav-arrow {
            display: none; /* Hidden by default on desktop */
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            z-index: 3; /* Ensure arrows are above slides */
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
            border: none;
            border-radius: 50%;
            width: 40px; /* Adjusted from 44px */
            height: 40px; /* Adjusted from 44px */
            cursor: pointer;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 0;
            transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
            color: white; /* Style for text arrow */
            font-size: 24px; /* Style for text arrow */
            line-height: 1; /* Better vertical alignment for text */
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
        }
        .main-slider-nav-arrow:hover {
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 1);
        }
        .main-slider-nav-arrow.prev {
            left: 1rem;
        }
        .main-slider-nav-arrow.next {
            right: 1rem;
        }
        /* --- END: Mobile Arrow Navigation Styles --- */

        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            /* Hide pagination bar on mobile */
            #main-slider-outter-pagination-bar-container {
                display: none;
            }
            /* Show navigation arrows on mobile */
            .main-slider-nav-arrow {
                display: flex;
            }

            .main-slider-outter-pagination-item {
                flex-grow: 0;
                flex-basis: auto;
                min-width: 150px;
            }
             .main-slider-outter-slide {
                padding: 2rem 1.5rem; 
            }
            .main-slider-outter-title {
                font-size: 40px;
            }
            .main-slider-outter-caption {
                font-size: 16px;
                max-width: 100%;
            }
        }
        
        /* ADJUSTMENT: Removes outside padding/margin for the demo body */
        body {
            background-color: #121212;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
        }
    </style>



    <div id="main-slider-outter-wrapper">

            <div class="main-slider-outter-slide active-slide" style="background-image: url('https://mms.businesswire.com/media/20250226714082/en/2393322/5/Omega3.jpg');">

            </div>
            <div class="main-slider-outter-slide" style="background-image: url('https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de7d4178ec151188f7a55/1748887605249/03+-+Application.png');">

            </div>
            <div class="main-slider-outter-slide" style="background-image: url('https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de7d4e22a5430f4d6878f/1748887605217/01+-+Research.jpg');">

    <script>
    (function() {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.main-slider-outter-slide');
            const paginationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.main-slider-outter-pagination-item');
            const paginationBarContainer = document.getElementById('main-slider-outter-pagination-bar-container');
            const sliderContainer = document.getElementById('main-slider-outter-container');
            
            // --- START: Arrow Navigation Logic ---
            const prevButton = document.querySelector('.main-slider-nav-arrow.prev');
            const nextButton = document.querySelector('.main-slider-nav-arrow.next');
            // --- END: Arrow Navigation Logic ---

            let paginationIndicator = document.getElementById('main-slider-outter-pagination-indicator');
            if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                paginationIndicator = document.createElement('div');
                paginationIndicator.id = 'main-slider-outter-pagination-indicator';
                paginationBarContainer.appendChild(paginationIndicator);
            }

            if (slides.length === 0 || paginationItems.length === 0 || slides.length !== paginationItems.length) {
                console.error("Slider initialization failed: slides or pagination items are missing or mismatched.");
                return;
            }
            
            // --- START: Helper function to get current slide index ---
            function getCurrentIndex() {
                const slidesArray = Array.from(slides);
                return slidesArray.findIndex(slide => slide.classList.contains('active-slide'));
            }
            // --- END: Helper function ---

            function goToSlide(index, isInitialLoad = false) {
                if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) {
                    console.warn(`goToSlide called with invalid index: ${index}`);
                    return;
                }

                const currentActiveSlide = document.querySelector('.main-slider-outter-slide.active-slide');
                const currentActivePaginationItem = document.querySelector('.main-slider-outter-pagination-item.active-pagination-item');
                if (currentActiveSlide) {
                    currentActiveSlide.classList.remove('active-slide');
                }
                if (currentActivePaginationItem) {
                    currentActivePaginationItem.classList.remove('active-pagination-item');
                }

                slides[index].classList.add('active-slide');
                paginationItems[index].classList.add('active-pagination-item');

                if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                    const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[index];
                    const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;

                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                        const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                        if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                            paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                        }
                    });
                    
                    if (!isInitialLoad && window.innerWidth <= 767) { // Only scroll pagination bar if visible
                        targetPaginationItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' });
                    }
                }
            }

            paginationItems.forEach(item => {
                item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                    if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                        goToSlide(slideIndex);
                    }
                });
            });
            
            // --- START: Event Listeners for Arrow Buttons ---
            if (prevButton && nextButton) {
                prevButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    let currentIndex = getCurrentIndex();
                    if (currentIndex === -1) return;
                    const prevIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length;
                    goToSlide(prevIndex);
                });

                nextButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    let currentIndex = getCurrentIndex();
                    if (currentIndex === -1) return;
                    const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % slides.length;
                    goToSlide(nextIndex);
                });
            }
            // --- END: Event Listeners for Arrow Buttons ---

            // --- START: MOBILE SWIPE LOGIC ---
            let touchStartX = 0;
            let touchStartY = 0;
            let touchEndX = 0;
            let touchEndY = 0;
            let isSwiping = false;

            sliderContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', (event) => {
                touchStartX = event.changedTouches[0].screenX;
                touchStartY = event.changedTouches[0].screenY;
                isSwiping = false; 
            }, { passive: true });

            sliderContainer.addEventListener('touchmove', (event) => {
                if (isSwiping) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    return;
                }
                const deltaX = event.changedTouches[0].screenX - touchStartX;
                const deltaY = event.changedTouches[0].screenY - touchStartY;

                if (Math.abs(deltaX) > Math.abs(deltaY) + 10) {
                    isSwiping = true;
                    event.preventDefault();
                }
            }, { passive: false }); 

            sliderContainer.addEventListener('touchend', (event) => {
                touchEndX = event.changedTouches[0].screenX;
                handleSwipeGesture();
                isSwiping = false; 
            }, { passive: true });

            function handleSwipeGesture() {
                const deltaX = touchEndX - touchStartX;
                const swipeThreshold = 50; 

                if (isSwiping && Math.abs(deltaX) > swipeThreshold) {
                    let currentIndex = getCurrentIndex();
                    if (currentIndex === -1) return; 

                    if (deltaX < 0) {
                        const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % slides.length;
                        goToSlide(nextIndex);
                    } else {
                        const prevIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + slides.length) % slides.length;
                        goToSlide(prevIndex);
                    }
                }
            }
            // --- END: MOBILE SWIPE LOGIC ---

            setTimeout(() => {
                goToSlide(0, true);
            }, 100);

            let resizeTimeout;
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
                resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const currentActiveIndex = getCurrentIndex();
                    if (currentActiveIndex !== -1 && paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer.style.display !== 'none') {
                        const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                        const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                                paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                                paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }, 250);
            });

            if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                let scrollTimeout;
                paginationBarContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                    clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                    scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                        const currentActiveIndex = getCurrentIndex();
                        if (currentActiveIndex !== -1) {
                            const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                            const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                            const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                            const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                            requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                                if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                    const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                    paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                                }
                            });
                        }
                    }, 150);
                }, { passive: true });
            }
        });
    })();
    </script>



  
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div>

    <style>
        /* --- START: IMAGE SHOWCASE CSS --- */

        #image-showcase-slider-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1440px; 
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }

        #image-showcase-slider-content {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            border-radius: 5px;
        }
        
        #image-showcase-slider-track {
            display: flex; 
            gap: 18.984px;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .image-showcase-slider-item-container {
            width: 50%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .image-showcase-slider-item-image {
            width: 100%; 
            height: auto;
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 14; 
            object-fit: cover; 
            display: block; 
            border-radius: 5px;
        }

        .image-showcase-slider-item-caption {
            font-weight: 300; 
            font-size: 16px; 
            color: #ffffff; 
            margin-top: 1.5rem; 
            margin-bottom: 1rem; 
            padding: 0; 
            text-align: left;
        }

        .learn-more-btn {
            display: inline-block;
            background-color: #ffffff;
            color: #121212;
            padding: .9rem 2.2rem;
            border-radius: 50px;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-top: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 0rem;
            transition: background-color 0.3s ease;
        }

        .learn-more-btn:hover {
            background-color: #e0e0e0;
        }

        /* --- RESPONSIVENESS --- */
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
            #image-showcase-slider-track {
                flex-direction: column;
                gap: 1.5rem;
            }

            .image-showcase-slider-item-container {
                width: 100%;
            }

            .image-showcase-slider-item-caption {
                font-size: 14px;
                margin-top: 1rem;

    <style>
        /* --- START: EXPANDABLE LIST CSS --- */
        #feature-list-outter-container {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column-reverse; /* ADJUSTMENT: Image on top on mobile */
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin: 0rem auto;
            background-color: transparent;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            color: #ffffff;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-list-column {
            width: 100%;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            position: relative;
            padding: 0;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-list {
            list-style: none;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #444444;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-item {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #444444;
            position: relative;
            padding-left: 25px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            width: 2px;
            height: 0;
            border-radius: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(0deg, #7735fc, #ba98fc, #7735fc);
            background-size: 100% 300%;
            animation: pulseGradientVertical 3s ease infinite paused;
            transition: height 0.5s ease-out, top 0.5s ease-out, opacity 0.5s ease-out;
            opacity: 0;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-item.active > .feature-list-outter-indicator {
            opacity: 1;
            animation-play-state: running;
        }

        @keyframes pulseGradientVertical {
            0% { background-position: 50% 0%; opacity: 0.7; }
            50% { background-position: 50% 100%; opacity: 1; }
            100% { background-position: 50% 0%; opacity: 0.7; }
        }

        .feature-list-outter-content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
            padding: 1rem 0;
            display: block;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-title {
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #fff;
            margin: 0;
            margin-right: 0.5em;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-item.active .feature-list-outter-title {
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-number {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: #7e58f5;
            line-height: 1.3;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-description {
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            font-weight: 300;
            max-height: 0;
            overflow: hidden;
            transition: max-height 0.5s ease-out, margin-top 0.5s ease-out;
            color: #fff;
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            margin-top: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            word-break: break-word;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-description p {
            margin: 0;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-item.active .feature-list-outter-description {
            margin-top: 0.5rem;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-image-column {
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 50vh; /* Adjusted for mobile */
            background-color: #111;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
            position: relative;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 2rem; /* Space between image and list on mobile */
        }

        .feature-list-outter-image-column::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
            background-size: cover;
            background-position: center;
            background-image: var(--bg-image-before, none);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.8s ease-in-out;
            z-index: 1;
        }

        .feature-list-outter-image-column.fade-in::before {
            opacity: 1;
            z-index: 3;
        }
        
        /* --- DESKTOP STYLES --- */
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            #feature-list-outter-container {
                flex-direction: row; /* Side-by-side on desktop */
            }

            .feature-list-outter-list-column {
                width: 25%;
                padding-right: 20px;
            }

            .feature-list-outter-image-column {
                width: 75%;
                min-height: 70vh;
                margin-bottom: 0;
            }

            .feature-list-outter-title {
                font-size: 22px;
            }
        }
    </style>



    <div id="feature-list-outter-container">
        <div class="feature-list-outter-list-column">
            <ul class="feature-list-outter-list">
                <li class="feature-list-outter-item active" data-image="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de47181670468ef0ec6a0/1748886664839/01+-+manufacturability.jpg">
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-indicator" style="top: 12px; height: 154px;"></div>
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-content-wrapper">
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-header">
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-title">Manufacturability</span>
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-number">01</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-description" style="margin-top: 0.5rem; max-height: 125px;">
                            <p>We design our own chips and manufacture our Omega chipset at GlobalFoundries flagship fab in Malta, NY.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </li>

                <li class="feature-list-outter-item" data-image="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/a1a87bab-bc04-45c5-9e00-c7d86d212465/DSC_6699.jpg?content-type=image%2Fjpeg">
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-indicator"></div>
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-content-wrapper">
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-header">
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-title">Networking</span>
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-number">02</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-description">
                            <p>We scale beyond a single chip using standard telecom optical fiber — used today in conventional datacenters — without any need for transduction.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </li>

                <li class="feature-list-outter-item" data-image="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de471ef839c4c219cbd22/1748886805633/04+-+Cooling+Power.png">
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-indicator"></div>
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-content-wrapper">
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-header">
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-title">Cooling Power</span>
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-number">03</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-description">
                            <p>Because photons don’t feel heat or electromagnetic interference, we can colocate control electronics close to the qubit — improving system size, cost and signal integrity.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </li>

                <li class="feature-list-outter-item" data-image="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/69cabcea8d3abe4964bc6efb/1774894326661/control+electronics+-+2+(1).png">
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-indicator"></div>
                    <div class="feature-list-outter-content-wrapper">
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-header">
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-title">Control electronics</span>
                            <span class="feature-list-outter-number">04</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="feature-list-outter-description">
                            <p>Our systems allow for the integration of control electronics within modular packaging units, reducing physical complexity and minimizing the need for extensive wiring and external hardware.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="feature-list-outter-image-column fade-in" id="feature-list-outter-image-display" style="--bg-image-before: url('https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de47181670468ef0ec6a0/1748886664839/01+-+manufacturability.jpg'); background-image: url("https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683de47181670468ef0ec6a0/1748886664839/01+-+manufacturability.jpg");"></div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.feature-list-outter-item');
            const imageDisplay = document.getElementById('feature-list-outter-image-display');
            let activeItem = null;

            if (listItems.length === 0 || !imageDisplay) {
                return;
            }

            function positionIndicator(item) {
                const indicator = item.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-indicator');
                const contentWrapper = item.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-content-wrapper');
                const header = item.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-header');
                const description = item.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-description');

                if (!indicator || !contentWrapper || !header || !description) return;

                const headerTopRelativeToListItem = contentWrapper.offsetTop + header.offsetTop;
                let contentHeight = header.offsetHeight;

                if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                    const descMarginTop = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(description).marginTop) || 0;
                    contentHeight += descMarginTop + description.scrollHeight;
                } else {
                    contentHeight = 0;
                }

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    indicator.style.top = `${headerTopRelativeToListItem}px`;
                    indicator.style.height = item.classList.contains('active') ? `${Math.max(0, contentHeight)}px` : '0px';
                });
            }

            function changeImageWithFade(imageUrl) {
                if (!imageDisplay) return;
                imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', `url('${imageUrl}')`);
                imageDisplay.classList.add('fade-in');

                setTimeout(() => {
                    imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
                    imageDisplay.classList.remove('fade-in');
                    imageDisplay.style.removeProperty('--bg-image-before');
                }, 800);
            }

            imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', 'none');

            function setActiveItem(clickedItem) {
                if (clickedItem === activeItem) return;

                if (activeItem) {
                    const oldDesc = activeItem.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-description');
                    activeItem.classList.remove('active');

                    if (oldDesc) {
                        oldDesc.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                        oldDesc.style.marginTop = '0px';
                    }

                    const oldIndicator = activeItem.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-indicator');
                    if (oldIndicator) oldIndicator.style.height = '0px';
                }

                const newDesc = clickedItem.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-description');
                clickedItem.classList.add('active');

                if (newDesc) {
                    newDesc.style.marginTop = '0.5rem';
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        newDesc.style.maxHeight = newDesc.scrollHeight + "px";
                        positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                    });
                } else {
                    positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                }

                activeItem = clickedItem;

                const imageSrc = clickedItem.getAttribute('data-image');
                if (imageSrc) {
                    changeImageWithFade(imageSrc);
                }
            }

            listItems.forEach(item => {
                item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    setActiveItem(item);
                });

                const description = item.querySelector('.feature-list-outter-description');
                if (description) {
                    description.addEventListener('transitionend', (event) => {
                        if (event.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                            positionIndicator(item);
                        }
                    });
                }
            });

            if (listItems.length > 0) {
                const firstItem = listItems[0];
                const initialImageSrc = firstItem.getAttribute('data-image');

                if (initialImageSrc && imageDisplay) {
                    imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${initialImageSrc}')`;
                }

                setTimeout(() => {
                    setActiveItem(firstItem);
                }, 50);
            }

            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                if (activeItem) {
                    setTimeout(() => positionIndicator(activeItem), 100);
                }
            });
        });
    })();
    </script>


  
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div>
    </div>
  
  </div>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="//assets.squarewebsites.org/custom-filter/custom-filter.min.css">
<script>
window.customFilterSettings = {
    'targets': [{
        container: '#block-421b54089921b0d51a8a',// css selector for filter container
        items: '.summary-item',// css selector for items to filter
        settings: {
            position: 'top',//set the position for filter to appear. May be: top, left, right
            align: 'center',// align filter options, may be: left, center, right, space-between
            showItemsCount: true, // show (true) or hide (false) Items count
            collectionUrl: '/news-import',// you need to set source collection url slug (like /blog) if your items have external links (not linked to themselves)
            itemsCount: {
                enabled: true, // same as showItemsCount
                text: '', // set the items text before counter, it is Items: by default and you may set your own text
                positionOrder: 1 // items counter position, higher means last
            },
            keepDropdownsOpenOnInit: false, // if set to true, dropdowns will be opened initially
            customClasses: 'lite-dropdowns',
            /* Add any custom classes to filter container if you want to have your own to use in CSS styling,
            available: cf-sort-right (move sorting element right), cf-sort-left (move sort left), lite-dropdowns(gives lighter dropdowns stylings), cf-ctrls-inline (makes dropdowns fit one line space)*/
            view: 'dropdowns', // available: dropdowns, breadcrumbs, modern, buttons, buttons-round, buttons-pill, buttons-inline
            sticky: {// if enabled: true - trying enable sticky position of Filter to be seen on scroll
                enabled: false,
                top: '6%'
            },
            simpleFilter: {
                show: {
                    effect: 'fade',
                    transitionDuration: 300,
                    stagger: 60
                },
                hide: {
                    effect: 'fade',
                    transitionDuration: 100,
                    stagger: 18
                }
            },
            pagination: {
              enabled: true, // enable pagination
              pageSize: 30, // set the page size to 30
            },
            /*----Mobile Panel Section----*/
            mobilePanel: {// control if you want to have separate offscreen panel with filters on small screens
                enabled: true,// if set to false, no filter buttons on mobiles will be showed
                triggerButtonName: 'Filter', // trigger button text
                keepDropdownsOpen: null, // if false it overrides desktop settings, if true - dropdowns opened
                closeOnSelect: false, // mobile panel closed just after user selected something
                closeOnSearch: false, // mobile panel closed if user searced something in searc field
                closeOnOutsideClick: false // if true, mobile panel will be closed if user clicks outside it
            },
            /*----Filters Section----*/
            filter: { // here you define all filters you need and name them
                category: false, // disabling default Category dropdown
                tag: false, // disabling default Tag dropdown
                items: [{
                    name: 'Category', // give the dropdown (fiter entity) name you want
                    multiple: true, // if true, allow to select multiple options
                    logic: 'and', // how to combine dropdown options with other dropdowns logic. Other value is or
                    multipleLogic: 'or',// combine each selected option with OR or AND logic within one dropdown
                    closedSubOptions: false, // works for Products 7.1 subcategories onl
                    sort: 'asc', // may be asc, desc, asAllowed (need define options list in allowedOptions), or your own custom function
                    getAttr: 'categories'// here you say Filter to look for options in items categories
                }, {
                    name: 'Tags',// give the dropdown (fiter entity) name you want
                    multiple: true,//if true, allow to select multiple options
                    getAttr: 'tags'// here you say Filter to look for options in items tags
                }]
            },
            sort: {// define the sorters
                enabled: true,// if false - no sorters visible/working
                //defined: 'date_desc',// select which of defined sorters will work initially
                items: [{
                    name: 'Alphabetical',
                    order: 'asc|desc',
                    orderTexts: 'A-Z|Z-A',
                    hideName: true,
                    sort: '.summary-title-link'
                },{
                    name: 'Date',// name your sorter
                    order: 'asc|desc',// apply the orders you want to use
                    orderTexts: 'Older|Newer',// name the orders in format you need
                    hideName: true,// if true, you will not see Date name
                    sort: '[data-publish-on] parseInt'//if properly configured, each Squarespace item will have publish date as data attribute. parseInt saysFilter operate it as integer number
                }, {
                    name: 'Price',// name your sorter
                    order: 'asc|desc',// define orders
                    hideName: true,// hide the Price name
                    orderTexts: '$-$$$|$$$-$'// define orders naming
                    /* If sorter named as Price, you do not need define sort selectors or function: it will work the same like you defined:
                    sort: '[data-price] parseInt'
                    */
                }]
            },
            search: {
                enabled: true,// if false, no Search input will be showed
                text: 'Search', //set the placeholder to your search field, otherwise Search will be used
            }
        }
    }]
};
</script>
